info.name: Tanium Threat Response API
info.description:
The Tanium Threat Response REST API enables starting investigations, viewing Recorder events, gathering evidence, and performing file and directory operations on endpoints for threat detection and incident response. All endpoints are under the /plugin/products/threat-response/api/v1/ base path.

Contact Support:
 Name: Tanium Support

request.description: Returns the current status of the Tanium Threat Response service including version information and operational state.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific alert including associated computer information, intel document references, and current state.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) Alert ID or comma-separated list of alert IDs

request.description: Updates the state of one or more alerts. Multiple alert IDs can be provided as a comma-separated list in the path. Valid states are unresolved, inprogress, resolved, dismissed, and ignored.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Number of alerts to skip for pagination

request.description: Retrieves a paginated list of threat alerts. Alerts can be filtered by computer name, IP address, severity, priority, type, state, and associated intel document or scan configuration.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of alerts to return
Number of alerts to skip for pagination

item.name: Create A Live Connection To An Endpoint

request.description: Initiates a live connection to a specified endpoint for investigation purposes. Requires the client ID, IP, platform, and hostname of the target endpoint.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Initiates a snapshot capture from a connected endpoint. The snapshot captures a point-in-time image of endpoint Recorder data for offline analysis.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of events to return
Number of events to skip for pagination
Comma-separated list of fields to include

request.description: Retrieves Recorder events from a connected endpoint filtered by event type. Supported event types include File, Network, Registry, Process, Driver, Combined, DNS, and Image.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of events to return
Number of events to skip for pagination
Comma-separated list of fields to include

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of events to return
Number of events to skip for pagination
Comma-separated list of fields to include

request.description: Returns a summary count of Recorder events by type for a specific connection, useful for understanding the volume of activity on an endpoint.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of events to return
Number of events to skip for pagination

request.description: Retrieves events associated with a specific process on a connected endpoint, identified by its process table ID and event type.

request.description: Retrieves the process tree for a specific process, showing parent, child, and sibling processes. Useful for understanding process lineage during investigations.

item.name: Request A File Download From An Endpoint

request.description: Initiates a file download from a connected endpoint. The file is transferred from the endpoint to the Tanium server for analysis.

item.name: List Labels For An Intel Document

request.description: Retrieves the labels associated with a specific intel document. Labels categorize and organize intel documents for easier management.

request.description: Associates a label with an intel document for classification and organization purposes.
